name: official-business-plugins
description: Official Web Lifter business plugin marketplace — five plugins spanning SMB operations, data science, economics, brand + SEO marketing, and venture building. Every skill produces evidence-backed markdown in Australian English and writes to the shared .project/ workspace (see OUTPUT-CONVENTIONS.md).

plugins.name: business-operations
plugins.description: 5 skills for SMB operations — revenue channel mapping, KPI frameworks, stakeholder briefs, bottleneck detection, and pricing strategy

plugins.name: data-science
plugins.description: 9 data-science skills — dataset profiling & quality audit, data-dictionary generation, data-pipeline architecture, cohort analysis, anomaly-detection rule building, A/B test design, experiment readouts, forecasting model specs, and causal-impact analysis

plugins.name: economics
plugins.description: 9 skills — unit economics (CAC/LTV), market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), pricing architecture, cost-structure modelling, break-even scenario modelling, cost-benefit analysis, competitive-dynamics analysis, elasticity estimation, and moat-strength audit

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: 28 marketing skills — end-to-end brand creation (identity, guidelines, audience, competitors, logo, colour, design tokens, disclaimers, copy) plus end-to-end SEO (keyword research + clustering, SERP & competitor analysis, on-page/technical/CWV audits, backlinks, content briefs, schema + entity modelling, local SEO)

plugins.name: startups
plugins.description: 70 skills across the full venture-building workflow — venture chassis, customer discovery, Strategyzer value-proposition & business-model canvases, competitor analysis, relationships & channels, prototyping, MVP planning + engineering bridge, and Lean-Startup experimentation
